result.position: Conditional certification only: the retained evidence described is the right shape, but it is sufficient only if the artifacts form a continuous, hash-bound chain from runtime prompt-build to real Codex host execution, raw wait batches, normalized transport collection, finalized WAL, trace, evidence, and validators. If any link is retained only as derived summary or regenerated output, treat it as a P0 blocker because it can certify simulated transport.
result.openQuestion: Whether the validators are provenance-checking the retained run itself or merely validating normalized artifacts remains the decisive release question.

content.summary: Certify only if retained raw host outputs, projection hashes, prompt-build artifacts, normalized collection, WAL, trace, evidence, and validators all bind to the same run. Missing raw wait provenance or validator substitution is P0.
